overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a city sidewalk beneath elevated highways, approaching a futuristic downtown skyline with holographic advertisements. The scene transitions from a concrete corner through an industrial underpass area toward the dense urban core.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beside multi-lane road approaching elevated highway interchange

events.description: red van drives past on the road to the right
entering the shadow of the elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: turning right from concrete platform onto sidewalk and walking steadily toward the overpass

notable_agents.action: red van driving past on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: low concrete wall at the corner where the walk begins
large concrete highway structure spanning across the road ahead
tall palm trees visible in the distance against the skyline
low-rise industrial structure with flat roof and piping

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a concrete corner where the camera turns right onto a sidewalk. A red van passes by on the adjacent road. The walk proceeds toward a massive elevated highway overpass, transitioning from open sunlight into the shadow beneath the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk beneath elevated highway interchange

events.description: slight left curve in the sidewalk as it follows the road
passing behind a large concrete support pillar temporarily obscuring the view ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the highway overpass, passing industrial infrastructure

entered.detail: massive concrete pillar supporting the elevated highway deck
tall metal lattice tower with power lines running alongside the road
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with holographic advertisements visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated highway in a semi-covered industrial zone. The camera passes massive concrete support pillars and power line towers while the futuristic city skyline with towering holographic advertisements becomes visible ahead. The lighting is diffused by the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to dense urban commercial district with holographic towers

events.description: emerging from under the densest part of overpass, view opens toward city center
dark sedan drives past on the road to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing walk toward the downtown skyline with towering holographic advertisements becoming more prominent

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall towers displaying large holographic advertisements with Asian characters floating above the city
multi-story commercial structures with billboards and signage
large cylindrical industrial storage tanks with orange and white coloring

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues the approach toward the dense urban core. The highway overpass structure moves to the right side as the view opens up. Prominent holographic advertising towers rise above the futuristic skyline, and industrial tanks become visible on the left. A dark sedan passes by on the road as the walk continues toward the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright concrete street corner into the shadowed industrial underbelly of a city, eventually opening up to a towering futuristic skyline. It begins by turning right onto a sidewalk as a red van passes by, moving from open sunlight toward the looming shadow of a massive elevated highway overpass. As the camera proceeds beneath the structure, the lighting becomes diffused, passing massive concrete support pillars and power line towers while the distant urban core and holographic advertisements first emerge. The scene then expands as the overpass shifts to the right, revealing industrial tanks on the left and a dark sedan passing on the road. Finally, the view opens fully toward the dense city center, dominated by prominent holographic advertising towers rising high above the skyline.
